backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining Lead and UserProfile types, with endpoints for submitting, deleting, and querying leads (admin-only) and saving/retrieving user profiles, using access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two features: generating an AI Odisha solar map hero image and updating the Hero component to use that new image as a full-screen background.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering components, hooks, styles, and i18n for the TRI-GITA SERVICE solar installation app.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for the design system's light and dark mode color tokens (background, foreground, primary, accent, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'TRI-GITA SERVICE | BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION' and mounting the root div with the main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the entire page in LanguageProvider and composes all section components (Header, Hero, SchemeInfo, OdishaGuide, Services, etc.) in order.
frontend/src/components/BankFinanceBanne: Dark navy banner section displaying bank finance stats (loan %, customer payment, tenure) sourced from translations, with a WhatsApp CTA button linking to the company's WhatsApp number.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: Fixed floating WhatsApp button component with a pulse ring animation, hover tooltip using the correct translation key, and a link to the company WhatsApp number.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Two-column footer with brand identity, tagline, WhatsApp link, and a contact column listing phone numbers, email, address, and service area, followed by a copyright bottom bar.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation header with scroll-aware styling, smooth-scroll nav links, a language switcher (EN/HI/OD), and a WhatsApp CTA button, plus a hamburger menu for mobile.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background solar map illustration, headline, tagline, WhatsApp and scheme CTA buttons, and three trust-stat cards.
frontend/src/components/InquiryForm.tsx: Lead capture form with fields for name, phone, email, city, and system size; validates input, submits via a mutation hook, then opens a pre-filled WhatsApp message on success.
frontend/src/components/OdishaGuide.tsx: Intersection-observer-animated section displaying a three-tier subsidy breakdown (central + state totals) for 1 kW, 2 kW, and 3 kW solar systems in Odisha.
frontend/src/components/SchemeInfo.tsx: Detailed PM Surya Ghar scheme explainer section covering benefits, eligibility, a four-step overview, four installation phases with icons, and 'why choose us' highlights.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Two-column services grid showcasing residential and commercial solar offerings, each with an image, feature checklist, and a CTA button that scrolls to the inquiry form.
frontend/src/components/WarrantyGuarante: Renders a three-card warranty section with navy/gold/teal accent themes, displaying years, title, and description for each warranty type using i18n translations.
Displays a styled CTA section with a WhatsApp link, phone number, and decorative elements, directing users to contact via WhatsApp using a hardcoded number.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: Renders a three-card 'Why Choose Us' section with navy/gold/teal accents, showing icons, titles, and descriptions sourced from i18n translations.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for managing the active language ('en', 'hi', 'od'), persisting the selection to localStorage and exposing it via a useLanguage hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status through a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useSubmitLead mutation hook that calls the backend actor's submitLead method with lead form data and invalidates the leads query on success.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Contains the full multi-language (en/hi/od) translation strings for all UI sections including hero, scheme info, warranty, and WhatsApp content.
frontend/src/i18n/useTranslation.ts: Hook that returns the translation object for the currently active language by reading from LanguageContext and indexing into the translations map.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Outfit, Playfair Display), sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using oklch colors, and declares keyframe animations (shimmer, pulse-ring, fade-in-up, accordion).
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to extract URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL bar without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom font families (Outfit, Playfair Display), oklch-based color palettes (navy, gold, teal, amber), CSS variable-mapped semantic colors, custom shadows, border radii, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, existing features, and image requirements for the TRI-GITA Solar app, specifically documenting tasks to generate an Odisha solar map hero image and update the Hero component to use it.
